prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年山东大学在青海省医学类最低录取位次为3149名（计划7人），2022年大幅上升至1621名（计划7人），2023年继续上升至1142名（计划7人），2024年达到近五年最高点99 3名（计划8人），2025年回落至1180名（计划7人）。五年间位次整体呈现先升后降的走势，2021至2024年持续走高，2025年出现明显回落。2026年医学类招生计划为7人，与2025 年持平，但专业结构有所调整：取消了2025年招生的齐鲁医学堂创新实验班（位次410）和药学类，将临床医学五年制名额从2人增至5人，高分段专业减少而普通临床名额增加， 整体录取门槛略有降低。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科源自齐鲁大学医学院，拥有百余年的办学历史，齐鲁 医学品牌在全国享有盛誉，临床医学专业实力突出，对青海省高分考生具有持续的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考的热门方向，临床医学尤其受到高分考生青睐，报考热度常年居高不下。山东大学地处山东省济南市，属于东部沿海发达省份，地理位置优越，对西 部地区考生有较强的地域吸引力。青海省医学类招生规模较小，山东大学在青海的医学类计划常年维持在7至8人，招生名额有限，竞争格局相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合考量历年位次走势及2026年招生计划变化，预计2026年山东大学在青海省医学类最低录取位次约为1200名，波动区间在1140至1260名之间。位次较2025年略有下降（更容易 进），主要由于2026年取消了齐鲁医学堂创新实验班等高分段专业，增加了普通临床医学五年制名额，整体录取门槛有所降低。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum admission rank for Medicine at Shandong University in Qinghai Province was 3149 (planned 7 students). In 2022, it rose significantly to 1621 (planned 7 students). In 2023, it continued to rise to 1142 (planned 7 students). In 2024, it reached the highest point in five years at 993 (planned 8 students). In 2025, it fell back to 1180 (planned 7 students). Over five years, the ranking showed an overall trend of first rising and then falling, with continuous increases from 2021 to 2024 and a notable decline in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan for Medicine is 7 students, unchanged from 2025, but the major structure has been adjusted: the Qilu Medical College Innovation Experimental Class (rank 410) and Pharmacy, which were offered in 2025, have been canceled, and the quota for Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) has increased from 2 to 5 students. High-score segment majors have decreased while regular clinical medicine slots have increased, slightly lowering the overall admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical discipline originates from the Qilu University School of Medicine, with over a hundred years of history. The Qilu Medicine brand enjoys a high reputation nationwide, and the Clinical Medicine program is particularly strong, consistently attracting high-scoring candidates from Qinghai Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance examinations, with Clinical Medicine especially favored by high-scoring candidates, maintaining high application enthusiasm year after year. Shandong University is located in Jinan City, Shandong Province, a developed eastern coastal province, offering a superior geographical location that strongly attracts candidates from western regions. The enrollment scale for Medicine in Qinghai Province is relatively small, with Shandong University's medical enrollment plan in Qinghai consistently maintained at 7 to 8 students. The limited enrollment slots result in a relatively stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking trends and changes in the 2026 enrollment plan, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank for Medicine at Shandong University in Qinghai Province in 2026 will be approximately 1200, with a fluctuation range between 1140 and 1260. The rank is expected to be slightly lower than in 2025 (easier to enter), mainly due to the cancellation of high-score segment majors such as the Qilu Medical College Innovation Experimental Class in 2026 and the increase in regular Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) slots, which lowers the overall admission threshold.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None (No Tier 3 majors in Medicine for this province in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) as the main target, and aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) as a stretch goal.
